properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2 V5

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: God saw Himself in flesh Even before creation, His purpose was redemption God always saw himself in flesh Even before creation, the Lamb was slain before the foundation of the world /: As Elohim He thought it all, Melchizedek created the worlds, but in Jesus, He expressed His love to us :/

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: We're on a journey that started in the mind of God and we'll end in a glorified body, He condescended so we can ascend

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: The Bride was the mystery hid in God, even before creation, to be expressed in another body, Yes the Bride was the mystery hid in God, even before creation, to be expressed in another body for redemption /: The Word herself takes the Word Itself and reveals Herself in Itself, Quickened in the scripture that's been written about Her (us) :/

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: We're ascending! Word upon Word, Truth upon Truth We rejoice to see our names in the Book Word upon Word, Truth upon Truth Thank you Lord we see our names in the Book Word upon Word, Truth upon Truth We rejoice to see our names in the Book Word upon Word, Truth upon Truth

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Now the Bride herself takes the Word Itself and reveals Herself in Itself
